prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Atorvastatin (20 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.6 kg; Height 178.2 cm; BMI 25.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 212mg/dL; 9 months ago 202mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 81.3kg; 9 months ago 82.1kg; 6 months ago 84.1kg; 3 months ago 81.9kg; current 81.6kg), Height (12 months ago 178.2cm; 9 months ago 178.2cm; 6 months ago 178.2cm; 3 months ago 178.2cm; current 178.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 26.0kg/m²; current 25.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 117U/L; 9 months ago 126U/L; 6 months ago 125U/L; 3 months ago 118U/L; current 120U/L), AST (12 months ago 43U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 45U/L; current 48U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 103mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 74mg/g; 9 months ago 75mg/g; 6 months ago 76mg/g; 3 months ago 59mg/g; current 61mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 104mg/dL; 9 months ago 97mg/dL; 6 months ago 103mg/dL; 3 months ago 103mg/dL; current 100mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 164mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 164mg/dL; current 171mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
